model_info.name: qwen2-1.5b-attn
model_info.note: Profiling-only steering config for Qwen2-1.5B. The vector at vector_path is a fixed random fp16 tensor (seed 0) — it does NOT correspond to any specific behavioural direction. Used solely to measure the cost of applied steering (matmul + add) in the profiling tool's R5 row. Not suitable for actual model-steering experiments.
